name: ahjo runtime
description: Bakes ahjo's runtime expectations into an Incus system container: sshd as a service, the host-key bind-mount dir, the ahjo-claude-prepare hook, Node + corepack, and the claude CLI. Applied to images:ubuntu/24.04 (with common-utils:2, git:1, github-cli:1 already on top) to produce ahjo-base.
